duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Usgs Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Bearish Industrials

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in usgs earthquake activity near major ports signals short-term freight logistics disruption and bearish xli

idea.title: Daily Spike In Usgs Earthquake Activity Near Major Ports Signals Bearish Industrials
idea.thesis: Sudden increase in earthquake activity near ports disrupts logistics and manufacturing supply chains. Port disruptions reduce industrial sector output and increase costs temporarily.
data_sources: USGS daily earthquake activity near major US ports
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLI when daily earthquake count near major ports exceeds 3 times the 14-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLI when daily earthquake count near major ports exceeds 3 times the 14-day average Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when earthquake counts normalize
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use USGS daily earthquake activity near major US ports via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity near ports can cluster episodically and cause measurable supply chain disruptions.
